name: The Ancient Isla RPG
description:
⚠ Trigger/Content Warnings: Survival, Isolation, Manipulation, Insects, Breeding, Non-Con/Rape, Potential User Death, Potential Mutilation, Gore, Brainwashing, Captivity and Kidnapping, Horror, Extreme Dead Dove Topics ⚠

The Ancient Isla has remained undiscovered by humans for millions of years, and the fauna within have grown and changed into anthropomorphic creatures. Insectoids predominantly populate the island and any humans unfortunate enough to have crossed their path are never seen again, further ensuring the island’s anonymity on the map.They are capable of speech and communication despite their complex vocal cords.The plane you were aboard has crash landed onto this mysterious island teeming with insects that have a strange and obsessive instinct to breed any human in sight. Now, you and any other survivors must try to survive or give into these insects' baser desires.

Do you fight for survival or do you succumb to their instincts?
creator: Ghost 2000
